raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging temporary self-abasement with implied eschatological deadline",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the soul possesses agency to direct its own treatment",
    "self-contempt can be deliberately chosen and time-limited",
    "a metaphysical endpoint exists after which self-respect becomes obligatory or inevitable",
    "current abuse serves a preparatory function for that endpoint"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a framework positing a soul with discrete temporal phases, though paradoxical in linking contempt to future respect",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a soul or consciousness must exist whose development follows a finite preparatory period culminating in obligatory self-regard, and deliberate self-abasement must functionally advance that trajectory",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such soul or temporal endpoint exists, self-contempt produces lasting fragmentation rather than eventual respect, or the promised transition never occurs"
}
